text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking along the<n>river...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah! What say you to that, Digital?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ggnaa, b-beautiful! S-s-sooo sublime!

Greetings, Trainer! Exactly what your<n>eyes bear
witness to, of course!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I think I'm gonna faint!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Observing the two does little to<n>explain the
situation, so I ask for<n>details.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I awaken to a refreshing<n>morning... I am
strolling alongside the<n>lovely river...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And lo! What a stunning work of art<n>nature has
created this day!
Wooookljh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Was that the wind? An oddly<n>unpleasant
sound, if it were.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter. First in order is a close-up<n>for my next
edition of collectible<n>portraits.
Wh-haaa?! New photos?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HYEEEEWRE?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is what transpired,Trainer!

Digital was observing me from a<n>concealed spot in
the forest. And so, I<n>brought her here to the best
seat in<n>the house!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gawww... She's showing mercy.<n>That's a new
core memory, straight<n>up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But hey, Opera O? How'd you even<n>know I was
there at all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nobody gets in the way of my<n>precious Umas
pairing up. And to<n>make sure of that, if I have to
hide in<n>the ceiling, walls—in this case,<n>trees—I'll do
it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'd turn into air if I only could. But I<n>didn't mean to
be a stone in your<n>way!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Digital, you are no stone. You are... my<n>fan.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tell me—these ears and hands of<n>mine, what are
they for?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
These ears, to hear what my fans<n>desire. These
hands, to guide you to<n>the future.

For the destined-to-be Centurial<n>Overlord,
engaging with a fan is no<n>trouble in the least.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyeeeh! She's got the face and heart<n>of a saint!
choice_data_list:
I guess support from your fans can keep you
motivated.
So, don't you have some close-ups to take?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Indeed!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, Digital. I'll show you the<n>strength in my
stride.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now with even more splendor, thanks<n>to your
enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooogh, I'll follow you anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O and Agnes<n>Digital run off
together, high-pitched<n>giggles and excited chatter
echoing in<n>their wake.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Of course, realizing their clamor is<n>likely to disturb
the surrounding<n>residents, I hastily guide them
back to<n>the academy's training track.

Oh! That's right. Your ability to<n>comprehend
situations is effortless<n>and astute. That's why
you're my<n>trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, today I will exhibit my certitude...<n>Digital, I
shall entrust you with<n>capturing my breathtaking
visage!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-you... want me to?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Who better than one who has<n>observed
my beauty up close?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, even the spirits who inhabit this<n>very river
are enthralled by my<n>appearance. It must be
immortalized<n>on film! Now, shoot!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Time to dial my camera skills<n>up to eleven!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As it turns out, Agnes Digital's<n>exceptional
photography skills appear<n>authentic. T.M. Opera O
praises the<n>"certitude" on display in her resulting
photo.
